hyperedges.label: Provider polling cycle: load_config → build states → poll providers → send BLE cycle
Self-registering provider adapters keyed by id
Three OS-specific installers wrap same daemon entry + setup wizard
BLE kinds rendered by ui layouts
Provider adapters register with base
Porting documentation triad
BLE end-of-cycle drives rate-bucket re-pick
hyperedges.rationale: On {end:1}, main computes ui_primary_pct_for_rate, samples usage_rate, and if the group changed while splash is active calls splash_pick_for_current_rate — the three modules form one loop driven by ProviderUsage state.

hyperedges.label: Idle / auto-sleep subsystem
hyperedges.rationale: idle.cpp implements the state machine using tunables from idle_cfg.h; main pumps idle_tick and gates touch + buttons via idle_consume_wake_press / idle_is_asleep.

hyperedges.label: SPLASH_THEME_WINE brand-fork assets
hyperedges.rationale: Wine Edition build flag swaps the splash sprite set (wine 48x48) and the 80x80 brand logo; splash.cpp's GROUP_NAMES table and ui.cpp's logo include both branch on this macro.

hyperedges.label: AMOLED-2.16 board implements all five HAL contracts
hyperedges.summary: The waveshare_amoled_216 board folder supplies a concrete implementation for every HAL contract (BoardCaps, display, touch, input, power, IMU). Together they satisfy the full HAL surface needed by shared code with no #ifdef BOARD_*.

hyperedges.label: AMOLED-1.8 board implements all five HAL contracts (with no-op rotation, no touch file in chunk)
hyperedges.summary: AMOLED-1.8 supplies BoardCaps/display/input/power/IMU HAL implementations plus a board-private XCA9554 IO expander module that gates display + PWR-button access. Rotation HAL is intentionally a no-op (fixed orientation).

hyperedges.label: CO5300 software-rotation pipeline (IMU -> display tick -> rotate_strip)
hyperedges.summary: QMI8658 reports a stable rotation quadrant; display_hal_tick detects the change, blanks the panel, invalidates LVGL, and from then on display_hal_draw_bitmap routes pixels through rotate_strip into rot_buf before pushing to the CO5300 — which itself cannot rotate via MADCTL.

Allocates PSRAM canvas sized to board's min(W,H); reads grid+palette_size per splash_anim_def_t and computes cell pitch per sprite (supports 20x20 claudepix and 48x48 wine). resolve_group_lists() maps usage-rate groups (0-3) to literal sprite names. splash_tick auto-rotates every 20s within the current rate group; splash_pick_for_current_rate calls usage_rate_group(). #ifdef SPLASH_THEME_WINE swaps GROUP_NAMES table to wine sprite mapping.

nodes.label: idle state machine
nodes.summary: Four-state machine (AWAKE / FADING_OUT / ASLEEP / FADING_IN) driving display_hal_set_brightness. begin_fade() linear-interpolates between 0 and DISPLAY_DEFAULT_BRIGHTNESS. idle_tick treats power_hal_is_vbus_in as continuous activity when IDLE_SLEEP_WHEN_CHARGING=false.

nodes.label: usage_rate API
nodes.summary: Tracks short-term %/min trend in session_pct. usage_rate_sample(pct) feeds new samples; usage_rate_group() returns 0=idle, 1=normal, 2=active, 3=heavy.

nodes.label: usage_rate ring buffer
nodes.summary: 6-slot ring buffer of (ms, pct) samples with ~4-min minimum window before trusting the slope. Thresholds: <0.10 idle, <0.20 normal, <0.33 active, else heavy. Drops history on session-reset (pct drop > 5).

nodes.label: main: setup+loop
nodes.summary: Firmware entry. setup() calls board_init then HAL init chain (display/power/imu/touch/input), creates LVGL display + indev (my_flush_cb -> display_hal_draw_bitmap, my_touch_cb -> touch_hal_read with idle-wake gating, rounder_cb -> display_hal_round_area), then ble_init + ui_init. loop() pumps idle/lvgl/ui/ble/power/imu/splash/display ticks, handles button edges (primary=HID Space, secondary=HID Shift+Tab, PWR=cycle screens or splash_next), parses BLE JSON via parse_json (provider payloads + {end:1} EOC marker pruning stale slots), feeds usage_rate_sample and pushes ui_set_state.

nodes.label: splash_anim_def_t (struct)
nodes.summary: Grid-agnostic descriptor for a splash animation: name, category, frame_count, grid, palette_size, palette pointer, frames buffer, and per-frame hold durations.

nodes.label: font_styrene_28 (LVGL bitmap font)

nodes.label: BoardCaps HAL contract
nodes.summary: Runtime board description struct (name, width, height, button_count, has_rotation, has_battery, has_imu) exposed via board_caps(). Lets shared UI / main code branch on capabilities without #ifdef BOARD_*.

nodes.label: Display HAL contract
nodes.summary: Display abstraction: init, begin, set_brightness, fill_screen, draw_bitmap, tick, round_area. Hides QSPI bus + panel driver + CPU rotation from shared code. Dimensions queried via BoardCaps.

nodes.label: Touch HAL contract
nodes.summary: Touch abstraction: init + read(x, y, pressed). Implementation owns latest-sample state. Called once per loop from LVGL touch callback. Must complete in <5 ms.

nodes.label: Input HAL contract
nodes.summary: Physical button abstraction. PRIMARY (BOOT/GPIO 0 -> Space PTT) and optional SECONDARY (-> Shift+Tab mode toggle). Boards without a secondary button return held=false. PWR is owned by power_hal.

nodes.label: Power HAL contract
nodes.summary: Power/battery/PWR-button abstraction. Provides battery_pct, is_charging, is_vbus_in, and edge-triggered pwr_pressed. Hides whether PWR comes from PMU PKEY IRQ or an IO expander.

nodes.label: IMU HAL contract
nodes.summary: Optional accelerometer-driven orientation tracker: init, tick, rotation_quadrant (0..3). Boards without an IMU or with rotation disabled return 0 and no-op.

nodes.label: AMOLED-2.16 BoardCaps instance
nodes.summary: Static BoardCaps for Waveshare AMOLED 2.16: 480x480, 2 buttons, rotation/battery/IMU all true.

nodes.label: AMOLED-2.16 input implementation
nodes.summary: Initializes BTN_BACK_GPIO (0, BOOT) and BTN_FWD_GPIO (18) as pull-ups and reports their active-low state through input_hal_is_held().

nodes.label: AMOLED-2.16 display implementation (CO5300)
nodes.summary: CO5300 driver via Arduino_ESP32QSPI. Implements CPU-side strip rotation (90/180/270 deg) into a PSRAM rot_buf because CO5300 MADCTL cannot rotate. display_hal_tick handles brightness-ramp flash on orientation change. round_area enforces even alignment.

nodes.label: AMOLED-2.16 IMU implementation (QMI8658)
nodes.summary: QMI8658 accelerometer driver. Maps gravity vector to one of four quadrants with a 0.5 tilt threshold and 300 ms stable-hold hysteresis before committing a new rotation. Polled at 10 Hz.

nodes.label: AMOLED-2.16 power implementation (AXP2101)
nodes.summary: AXP2101 PMU driver. Battery percent cached every 2 s, charging/VBUS every 500 ms. PWR button comes from PKEY short-press IRQ polled every 50 ms; pwr_pressed_flag is edge-triggered.

nodes.label: AMOLED-2.16 board.h (pins + flags)
nodes.summary: Compile-time pin map and capability macros for Waveshare ESP32-S3-Touch-AMOLED-2.16: 480x480 CO5300 QSPI, CST9220 touch at 0x5A, AXP2101 PMU at 0x34, BOOT button (GPIO 0) and forward button (GPIO 18). BOARD_HAS_IO_EXPANDER=0.

nodes.label: AMOLED-2.16 board_init()
nodes.summary: Per-board pre-init: brings up the shared I2C bus via Wire.begin(IIC_SDA, IIC_SCL). No IO expander needed on this board.

nodes.label: AMOLED-2.16 touch implementation (CST9220)
nodes.summary: CST9220 driver via TouchDrvCST92xx. Uses TP_INT FALLING ISR to latch touch_data_ready, then reads one point in touch_hal_read(). Sets setSwapXY(true) and setMirrorXY(true, false) for this panel's axis convention.

nodes.label: AMOLED-1.8 BoardCaps instance
nodes.summary: Static BoardCaps for Waveshare AMOLED 1.8: 368x448, 1 button, has_rotation=false, has_battery and has_imu still true.

nodes.label: AMOLED-1.8 input implementation
nodes.summary: Initializes BOOT button as pull-up (primary). Secondary button is not present on this board — always returns false. PWR button is routed through power_hal via XCA9554 EXIO4.

nodes.label: AMOLED-1.8 display implementation (SH8601)
nodes.summary: SH8601 driver via Arduino_ESP32QSPI. Fixed at 0 deg — no CPU rotation, no rot_buf. Reset is routed through the XCA9554 IO expander, so io_expander_init() must run before display_hal_init().

nodes.label: AMOLED-1.8 IMU implementation (no-op rotation)
nodes.summary: Initializes QMI8658 so the shared I2C bus stays healthy but disables rotation logic (always reports quadrant 0). Kit's enclosure mounts the panel in a fixed orientation.

nodes.label: AMOLED-1.8 power implementation (AXP2101 + IO expander)
nodes.summary: Same AXP2101 battery/charging path as the 2.16 board, but the PWR button is read from XCA9554 EXIO4 (active HIGH) via io_expander_get() with a software edge detector instead of the PMU PKEY IRQ.

nodes.label: AMOLED-1.8 IO expander (XCA9554) header
nodes.summary: Board-private XCA9554/PCA9554 I2C IO expander API: init, set, get. Gates LCD reset, TP reset, audio amp enable, and reads the PWR button. Must initialize before display or touch or they stay in reset.

nodes.label: boards/waveshare_amoled_18/board.h
nodes.summary: Pin/address/capability defines for Waveshare ESP32-S3-Touch-AMOLED-1.8 (SH8601 368x448 portrait + FT3168 + AXP2101 + XCA9554 + QMI8658). LCD_SCLK=11 (differs from 2.16 board), LCD reset routed via XCA9554 EXIO1. PWR button via expander EXIO4. BOARD_HAS_ROTATION=0 (IMU on but rotation disabled).

nodes.label: boards/waveshare_amoled_18/board_init.cpp
nodes.summary: AMOLED-1.8 pre-init: Wire.begin(IIC_SDA, IIC_SCL) then io_expander_init(). Must run before display_hal_init/touch_hal_init because SH8601 + FT3168 stay in reset until EXIO0..1 go HIGH.

nodes.label: boards/waveshare_amoled_18/touch.cpp
nodes.summary: Minimal inline FT3168 I2C reader (FocalTech standard register layout) used in lieu of Waveshare's GPLv3 Arduino_DriveBus library. Reads reg 0x02..0x06 on TP_INT ISR FALLING edge. touch_hal_init writes power-mode reg 0xA5=0x00 (active scan), logs ID reg 0xA0.

nodes.label: boards/waveshare_amoled_18/io_expander.cpp
nodes.summary: XCA9554/PCA9554 driver. Config mask 0xF8 (EXIO0..2 outputs, rest inputs). io_expander_init() holds reset (output=0x00) for 20ms then releases (0x07 = LCD_RST, TP_RST, PA_EN all HIGH). Provides io_expander_set/get for arbitrary pin bits.

nodes.label: boards/template/caps.cpp
nodes.summary: Template caps.cpp - builds BoardCaps from board.h macros (name, width, height, button_count=1+BOARD_HAS_SECONDARY_BUTTON, has_rotation/battery/imu).

nodes.label: boards/template/input.cpp
nodes.summary: Template input HAL - BTN_BACK_GPIO as INPUT_PULLUP, BOARD_HAS_SECONDARY_BUTTON path is a TODO stub returning false.

nodes.label: boards/template/display.cpp
nodes.summary: Template display HAL skeleton - allocates Arduino_ESP32QSPI bus, leaves gfx and begin/draw/fill stubbed with comments pointing at the 2.16 reference port for CPU-rotation case. Implements display_hal_round_area with even-align mask.

nodes.label: boards/template/imu.cpp
nodes.summary: Template IMU HAL - empty stubs (init/tick noop, rotation_quadrant returns 0). New ports with QMI8658 copy from waveshare_amoled_216/imu.cpp.

nodes.label: boards/template/power.cpp
nodes.summary: Template power HAL stub - battery_pct=-1, is_charging/is_vbus_in/pwr_pressed all return false. UI hides battery via caps.has_battery when BOARD_HAS_BATTERY=0.

nodes.label: boards/template/board.h
nodes.summary: Template board.h with TODO placeholders for display geometry/QSPI pins/I2C/touch/PMU/buttons and the five BOARD_HAS_* capability flags. Copy/edit to scaffold a new board port.

nodes.label: boards/template/board_init.cpp
nodes.summary: Template board_init: Wire.begin(IIC_SDA, IIC_SCL) before any HAL device init, with TODO comment to run io_expander_init() if needed.

nodes.label: boards/template/touch.cpp
nodes.summary: Template touch HAL skeleton - INT pin INPUT_PULLUP + ISR setting touch_data_ready flag, TODO for I2C controller-specific reads. Constraint: touch_hal_read must complete <5ms.

nodes.label: build pipelines overview
nodes.summary: Top-level documentation for all asset build pipelines: sprite JSON schema (palette + frames[*].hold + palette-indexed grid), Claudepix 20x20 set (scrape_claudepix.js -> convert_to_c.js), Wine 48x48 set (PixelLab MCP workflow -> pixellab_to_claudepix.py -> convert_to_c.js), bitmap fonts (build_fonts.py wraps lv_font_conv with LVGL 9 struct patch), wine logo (build_wine_logo.py emits RGB565A8), and icons (png_to_lvgl.js with white tint default). All converters idempotent.

nodes.label: sprite JSON schema
nodes.summary: Per-sprite JSON contract consumed by convert_to_c.js: name, category, description, palette (starts with 'transparent', then #RRGGBB strings up to 256 colours), frame_count, and frames[] each with hold (ms) and grid (square 2D array of palette indices). All frames in one sprite share grid dimension; converter auto-detects so 20x20 (Claudepix) and 48x48 (Wine) coexist.

nodes.label: PixelLab MCP sprite workflow
nodes.summary: Per-sprite Wine-Edition generation procedure via PixelLab MCP (Tier 2 'Pixel Artisan' subscription required for animate_object): create_1_direction_object(size=48, view='sidescroller') -> get_object when status=review -> select_object_frames(indices=[k]) -> animate_object(frame_count=6) -> curl PNGs to tools/wine_data/pixellab/<sprite>_anim/ -> pixellab_to_claudepix.py -> convert_to_c.js.

nodes.label: LVGL 9 font struct patch
nodes.summary: build_fonts.py wraps lv_font_conv (v1.5.3) via npx and automatically applies the LVGL 9 struct patch so generated fonts populate release_glyph, kerning, static_bitmap, fallback, user_data. Glyph range: ASCII 0x20-0x7E plus Latin-1 supplement (§ · Ä Ö Ü ß ä ö ü) plus spinner symbols (· … ✢ ✳ ✶ ✻ ✽) on mono variants. Without the patch fonts compile but render invisible.

hyperedges.label: Provider polling cycle: load_config → build states → poll providers → send BLE cycle
Self-registering provider adapters keyed by id
Three OS-specific installers wrap same daemon entry + setup wizard
BLE kinds rendered by ui layouts
Provider adapters register with base
Porting documentation triad
BLE end-of-cycle drives rate-bucket re-pick
hyperedges.rationale: On {end:1}, main computes ui_primary_pct_for_rate, samples usage_rate, and if the group changed while splash is active calls splash_pick_for_current_rate — the three modules form one loop driven by ProviderUsage state.

hyperedges.label: Idle / auto-sleep subsystem
hyperedges.rationale: idle.cpp implements the state machine using tunables from idle_cfg.h; main pumps idle_tick and gates touch + buttons via idle_consume_wake_press / idle_is_asleep.

hyperedges.label: SPLASH_THEME_WINE brand-fork assets
hyperedges.rationale: Wine Edition build flag swaps the splash sprite set (wine 48x48) and the 80x80 brand logo; splash.cpp's GROUP_NAMES table and ui.cpp's logo include both branch on this macro.

hyperedges.label: AMOLED-2.16 board implements all five HAL contracts
hyperedges.summary: The waveshare_amoled_216 board folder supplies a concrete implementation for every HAL contract (BoardCaps, display, touch, input, power, IMU). Together they satisfy the full HAL surface needed by shared code with no #ifdef BOARD_*.

hyperedges.label: AMOLED-1.8 board implements all five HAL contracts (with no-op rotation, no touch file in chunk)
hyperedges.summary: AMOLED-1.8 supplies BoardCaps/display/input/power/IMU HAL implementations plus a board-private XCA9554 IO expander module that gates display + PWR-button access. Rotation HAL is intentionally a no-op (fixed orientation).

hyperedges.label: CO5300 software-rotation pipeline (IMU -> display tick -> rotate_strip)
hyperedges.summary: QMI8658 reports a stable rotation quadrant; display_hal_tick detects the change, blanks the panel, invalidates LVGL, and from then on display_hal_draw_bitmap routes pixels through rotate_strip into rot_buf before pushing to the CO5300 — which itself cannot rotate via MADCTL.
